name: Logistics & Supply Chain

users.context: Picks items against pick lists, packs and labels parcels, scans barcodes at each step. Mobile across aisles with an RF scanner or wearable, gloved, time-and-rate measured.
users.expertise: Domain-fluent on the floor, low computer fluency. Needs scan-driven, minimal-typing, high-target UI.

users.context: Plans routes, assigns loads to drivers/vehicles, monitors ETAs and exceptions, reschedules around delays. High-tempo control-room work across maps and queues.
users.expertise: Expert in routing, capacity, and service levels; high tool fluency with map/Gantt views.

users.context: Executes the route, scans deliveries, captures proof-of-delivery (signature/photo), reports exceptions (failed delivery, damage). On the road, one-handed phone use, variable connectivity.
users.expertise: Intermediate; needs glanceable, offline-tolerant, distraction-safe mobile UI.

users.context: Prepares and validates customs declarations, classifies goods (HS codes), screens against denied parties and dual-use controls, manages duties and documentation.
users.expertise: Expert in trade regulation, Incoterms, and classification.

users.context: Oversees stock accuracy, cycle counts, replenishment, and order fulfilment SLAs; investigates shrinkage and exceptions.
users.expertise: Expert in WMS operations and inventory accuracy.

users.context: Books shipments, tracks status, and manages claims via a portal. Expects accurate real-time tracking and proactive exception alerts.
users.expertise: Intermediate; outcome-focused on visibility and reliability.

workflows.name: Order picking, packing, and dispatch
steps: Direct picker to bin and scan item/quantity
Confirm pick and route to pack station
Pack, weigh, and generate shipping label

workflows.name: Route planning and dispatch
steps: Aggregate orders and constraints (time windows, capacity)

workflows.name: Delivery execution and proof-of-delivery
steps: Record success or exception with reason

workflows.name: Cycle count and inventory reconciliation
steps: Generate count tasks by bin/ABC class

risks: Mis-pick or mis-scan shipping the wrong item or quantity to a customer
Wrong delivery address or stop sequencing causing failed/misdelivered parcels
Inventory inaccuracy (phantom or negative stock) breaking fulfilment promises
Lost proof-of-delivery leading to disputed deliveries and chargebacks
Customs misclassification (wrong HS code) causing fines, seizure, or delay
Shipping to a denied/sanctioned party (export-control breach)
Driver distraction from a non-glanceable app causing a safety incident
Field data lost because the app has no offline buffer
Cold-chain or hazmat handling rule missed, spoiling goods or breaching safety
Missed delivery time window breaching SLA and incurring penalties
environment_constraints: Scan-driven workflows on RF guns, wearables, and rugged mobiles
Gloved hands, cold-store and outdoor conditions, glare and dust
Variable and intermittent connectivity requiring offline tolerance
Driver attention is safety-critical; minimal interaction while moving
Real-time control room with map and exception monitoring
Hard delivery time windows and carrier cut-offs
domain_patterns: Route optimisation and sequenced stop list
audit_compliance: Customs and export-control regulations (HS codes, Incoterms, denied-party screening)
Cold-chain / GDP for pharma and perishables
GDPR for recipient personal data and signatures
Carrier and customer SLA / contractual obligations
accessibility_concerns: Large scan-confirm targets usable with gloves and one hand
High-contrast, anti-glare display for outdoor/cold-store use
Status not by colour alone (in-transit/delivered/exception need icon+text)
Driver UI must be glanceable and minimise interaction while moving
Audible/haptic confirmation tolerant of noisy environments
Legible at a glance for fast-paced pick/pack rate work
anti_patterns: Requiring manual typing where a scan would do
No offline buffer, losing scans and POD on connectivity drops
Dense, interaction-heavy driver app unsafe to use while moving
Silent inventory go-negative instead of flagging discrepancies
Skipping denied-party/HS validation before customs submission
Tiny touch targets unusable with gloves
Hiding the delivery time-window/SLA clock from the planner
